title: Karnataka man loses ₹75.4 lakh in WhatsApp investment scam: 5 ways to avoid fake advisors

summary: EPF is a retirement savings scheme with contributions from both employers and employees. Withdrawals before five years of service may incur tax, but exceptions apply. Details here.

title: Boost your borrowing power: How a healthy credit score improves loan eligibility, unlocks credit card benefits
summary: A strong credit score lowers credit card interest rates and improves borrowing power, helping consumers secure better loan terms, higher credit limits and greater financial flexibility.

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana: safe, tax-free — but is the lock-in too long?

title: From green dream to cost shield: How to make your EV truly value for money

title: Govt debunks rumours on temple gold monetisation, rejects ‘gold bond’ claims
summary: The Government of India has dismissed rumours about monetising temple gold, stating that no such proposals exist. A press release highlighted the importance of relying on verified information to prevent confusion and misinformation in the public sphere.

title: AI-powered early warning systems are changing credit risk management
summary: AI-powered early warning systems are transforming credit risk management by analyzing real-time data to identify financial stress. These systems enable lenders to act proactively, offering tailored interventions to borrowers and improving portfolio monitoring amidst global uncertainties.

title: Gold and silver price today, 19 May: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
summary: Gold prices today moved higher as softer crude oil prices and a weaker dollar lifted bullion demand, while investors tracked MCX gold futures and rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. title: Cognizant boosts buyback target to $2 billion amid AI-led growth push
summary: Cognizant has raised its share buyback programme to $2 billion, signalling strong capital return plans and confidence in long-term growth. The move triggered a sharp rally in the stock, even as the IT services firm continues to face pressure from a broader multi-year decline and valuation concerns.

title: Why Emkay is seeing Nifty at 29,000 by March 2027 despite oil shock, West Asia tensions
summary: Emkay Global maintains a bullish outlook on Indian equities, projecting the Nifty could reach 29,000 by March 2027, driven by strong domestic growth, earnings recovery and policy support. The brokerage expects markets to navigate near-term volatility from geopolitical tensions & high crude price
